purpose: Protection and controlled use of confidential information.
stronger_party: depends on whether NDA is one-way or mutual

expected_clauses.why_expected: Confidentiality obligation is the core purpose.
Survival and term should be clear.
Forum clarity helps but is not the core duty.
Remedies and injunctive relief affect enforcement.

false_positive_guardrails: Do not flag confidentiality missing when non-disclosure, proprietary information, secrecy, or data protection wording appears.
Residual knowledge is only relevant if the clause allows memory-based reuse.
Data privacy matters more if personal data is included in confidential information.
